side_effects.description: Vascular flushing lasting 5-10 minutes due to histamine reaction and blood pressure drop
Mild swelling and itching at injection site lasting approximately one hour, comparable to mosquito bite
Severe nausea and vomiting incident from dangerously low blood pressure caused by combination of Tadalafil, creatine, liquid glycerol, and inadequate hydration
Heart rate elevated to 140s resting for approximately 30 minutes due to blood pressure drop incident

protocol_notes: CJC-1295 No DAC variant. Duration: 3 months. Administration: 2-3 hours after meals, as close as possible to sleep onset. User reports no long-term damage from blood pressure incident. Critical oversight involved taking Tadalafil alongside creatine and liquid glycerol without adequate hydration. Emphasizes importance of hydration and awareness of other compounds being used. Normal flushing experience includes stronger heartbeat and audible blood flow in ears.
